Your Thought Industries tenant subdomain

The Thought Industries REST API v1 provides programmatic access to the Thought Industries B2B learning platform. Enables management of users, courses, enrollments, groups, content, categories, bundles, and reporting. Authentication uses API key via X-API-Key header or apiKey query parameter. Base URL is tenant-scoped per subdomain.
